facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 66 reviews. A bowl of Phở bát đá that locals keep coming back to.

Phở bát đá -bún bò bát đá Anh Đạt on 12 Lê Lợi is the kind of spot that doesn't need a menu photo, the regulars already know what to order. Stone-bowl pho and bún bò, served hot, served fast, served right.

No tourist markup. No English-language gimmicks. Just the real thing.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Stone bowl hits the table still bubbling. Bún bò bát đá at Anh Đạt, 4.8 stars and 66 locals can't be wrong. Skip the resort breakfast. Come here instead.
